---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for the Autohand Code Agent SDK
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement you'd like to see.

## Use Case

Describe the use case for this feature. Why would this be useful?

- **Problem**: What problem does this feature solve?
- **Solution**: How would this feature solve the problem?
- **Alternatives**: What alternatives have you considered?

## Proposed Implementation

If you have ideas on how this could be implemented, please describe them here.

## Examples

Provide examples of how this feature would be used:

```typescript
// Example usage of the proposed feature
import { Agent, Runner } from "@autohandai/agent-sdk";

// Your example code here
```

## Related Issues

- Issue # (link to related issues if any)
- PR # (link to related pull requests if any)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched for existing feature requests
- [ ] I have provided a clear description of the feature
- [ ] I have explained the use case and why this is needed
- [ ] I have provided examples of how this would be used
